messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'animatedXP'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [animatedXP, currentXP]

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
